title: Târgoviște、Dâmbovița — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Târgoviște、Dâmbovițaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TârgovișteはDâmbovițaにある人口79,610の都市です。The former capital of Wallachia, known for the Chindia Tower, the Royal Court ruins, and its role in the history of Vlad the Impaler.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
